docs.title: Welcome to the IMAX Guide
docs.text:
This website works as a directory of known IMAX screens around the world, with a focus on Laser and 15/70 film projection.

Begin by choosing a region.

docs.title: Brief History
docs.text:
A list was previously available on Wikipedia, but was removed by other editors in a policy disagreement. The last snapshot of that page is available here: List of IMAX Venues (as of May 5th 2024)

If you'd like the XML Export, a copy from May 1st 2024 is available here: Wikipedia-20240501181526.xml.

docs.title: Why create this site?
docs.text: This site exists to provide a consolidated place to hold the lists, freely accessible, without ads. I wanted to make it more useful by adding sorting options, and more features will come in the future. There is also a Wiki planned for a future theatre directory, as well as including Xenon screens in a separate list.

docs.title: Where can I find the source files?
docs.text: The code and CommonMark files used to generate this site are available on GitHub: imaxguide.

docs.title: How can I help?
docs.text:
Suggestions and corrections are always accepted. You can reach me on Reddit (u/anthonylavado), Mastodon (@anthonylavado:social.bonifacelabs.ca), or by e-mail (admin [AT] 143190.xyz).

A lot has changed since May. I'll need help updating it all.

Thanks, Anthony
